ladder_board.title: Whole-Ladder Board
ladder_board.label: REPORT_ONLY — no execution venue wired
ladder_board.decision_rules:
BET: edge_pp between +5 and +25 and market implied_prob between 0.10 and 0.80.
PASS: edge_pp < +5 (no edge) or implied_prob outside 0.10-0.80 (chalk/longshot).
CHECK: edge_pp > +25 — model disagrees with the market too much; probable model error, verify before betting. (No Kalshi market: NO_MARKET.)
